Ek Sachchi Kahani

2019 Mein Ek
Galti Hui Thi

Ek dost ka call aaya. Bola — "Bhai, Rajpur Road pe plot hai. ₹25,000 gaj. Le le."

Maine socha — "Kya rush hai? Baad mein dekhta hun."

"Baad mein dekhte hain" — duniya ki sabse mehngi line hai.

Feet ki Ghati

Aapke Plot Ki Boundary Se
Neeche Dense Jungle

Plot ki boundary pe khade ho. Neeche dekho — dense jungle ke beech Noon Nadi ka raaz. 300 feet ghane jungle ne view chhupa rakha hai — yahi jungle legal buffer ban jaata hai.

🌳 Dense Jungle = Permanent View Protection. Koi builder kabhi nahi aa sakta.
🏔 Mussoorie Ridgeline View — ~8.3 km. GPS Verified. No Obstruction.

Naya Kanoon

December 2025 Policy —
Fresh Window Khuli Hai

Cabinet: December 10, 2025 · CM Pushkar Singh Dhami

01
Agricultural Land Pe Resort
Bina land use change kiye agricultural plot pe resort bana sakte hain ab.
02
Road Width — Sirf 6 Metres
Pahadi areas mein construction ke liye sirf 6 metre road width kaafi hai ab.
03
Green Building = Extra FAR
Environment-friendly construction karo — bonus floor area ratio milega.
04
Single Window Clearance
Fast track approvals. Sab ek jagah se. Delays khatam.

Prakriti Ka Tohfa

Saliyawala Mein —
Ek Zinda Jungle

Saliyawala area mein ek natural bird sanctuary maujood hai. Yeh government-declared nahi hai — prakritik roop se bani hai. Jungle ke beech hazaron pakshi rehte hain — subah ki awaaz alag hi hoti hai.

✦ Government-made nahi — 100% Natural. Sadiyon se bana hua.
✦ Permanent wildlife corridor — kabhi develop nahi hoga.
✦ Rare birds spotted — nature lovers ke liye dream location.
✦ Eco-tourism ka future potential — tezi se badhti hui demand.
🐦 NATURAL BIRD SANCTUARY
Kyun Abhi?

Yeh Window
Hamesha Nahi Rahegi

📍
Flat Plateau — Limited Land
Expand nahi hoga. Jo plots hain, woh hain. Khatam ho gaye toh hamesha ke liye khatam.
🏠
Marriott Aa Gaya
5-star neighbour aa gaya — ab prices sirf badhenge. Neeche nahi aayenge kabhi.
🛣
Expressway 2026 = Price Jump
Delhi 2.5 ghante mein. Connectivity badhegi — demand badhegi — price badhega.
📋
Dec 2025 Policy Window
Naya kanoon abhi fresh hai. Early movers ko hamesha maximum benefit milta hai.
